title: Find My Device - Device list with more then 4 devices
scenario: Find My Device list becomes scrollable with fade indicator when more than 4 headsets are paired
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Pair more than 4 Poly Bluetooth audio devices (e.g., headsets) with the Android device. Devices can be connected or disconnected.
Tap on the Find My Device feature/list on the Home screen.
Observe the list behavior when more than 4 devices are paired.
expected: The Find My Device list expands to show all paired devices, is scrollable, and displays a slight fade at the bottom indicating scrolling ability.
